rationale: The citing paper studies brand-level price/advertising elasticities in U.K. CPG markets, while the cited paper examines how advertising and other factors shape consumers’ willingness to pay national-brand price premiums over private labels—so there is plausible conceptual overlap (brand pricing/advertising effects). However, the matched evidence is only a DOI-level reference entry with no citation-context text indicating substantive use (e.g., theory, method, or direct comparison). Given this sparse evidence, it is not safe to drop but also not strong enough to clearly keep.
